title: Tramp, Tramp, Tramp
writer: Frank Capra, Hal Conklin, Gerald C. Duffy
actors: Harry Langdon, Joan Crawford, Edwards Davis
plot: Low-life Harry falls in love with sweet Betty who inspires him to improve himself so he can marry her. He enters a $25, 000 cross-country hiking contest. After many adventures he wins, pays off his father Amos's mortgage and marri...
